scripts.dev: npm run -w apps/backend start & npm run -w apps/frontend start
scripts.build: npm run -w apps/frontend build && npm run -w apps/backend-nest build
scripts.test: npm run -w apps/backend test && npm run -w apps/frontend test -- --watchAll=false
scripts.lint: npm run -w apps/backend lint && npm run -w apps/frontend lint && npm run -w apps/backend-nest lint
